programme.title: E59
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.desc: ASIAN FINANCIAL INSIGHT: Based on the Hong Kong International Center, pay attention to the daily dynamics of the capital market and focus on hot political and economic events.
Chief Editor's Time: Daily key issues around the world are discussed on Chief Editor's Time. In-depth analyses and discussion gives viewers a better understanding of the issue.

programme.title: E1171
programme.desc: Zoom In: Pay attention to current political topics, major social events and news hot spots. Dig out more facts and backgrounds. Analyze the early consequences of news events, the fate of characters, and present authoritative views.

From Phoenix to the World, is a news program where reporters from around the world interact directly with the anchors through satellite and telephone lines to put audiences in touch with important events right form where they happen.

programme.title: E23 - 195型男走秀甜美直球追愛
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 藥商之女許婉寧前世遭丈夫背叛、親生骨肉被害，含恨重生；為了守護孩子並復仇，她與調查禁藥的金鱗衛大督主裴珩結盟，兩人從互有成見的試探，到相知相許的聯手，不僅粉碎了危害朝政的驚天陰謀，更在夢境與現實的交錯中，讓女主重獲自救的勇氣，開啟了全新人生。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 蒼梧國大將軍之女羲和遭滅門及暗算，重生為廢柴嫡女沈千夜。她懷著滿腔不甘踏上復仇之路，與疑似凶手的「小皇叔」裴夙糾纏不休。在調查真相的過程中，兩人從相互算計到聯手抗敵，揭開了蒼梧國隱藏的重重秘密。

programme.title: E1 - 互放狠話火藥味十足
programme.desc: 大型腦力競技真人秀，以「以省之名，我們一起贏」為slogan，由蔣昌建擔任主持人，攸佳寧、龐博、魏坤琳組成中國戰隊領隊候選人，並由朱丹及黃聖依等組成最強啦啦隊，以創新為魂，團隊為翼，共赴腦力盛宴。

programme.title: E1 - 互放狠話火藥味十足
programme.desc: 大型腦力競技真人秀，以「以省之名，我們一起贏」為slogan，由蔣昌建擔任主持人，攸佳寧、龐博、魏坤琳組成中國戰隊領隊候選人，並由朱丹及黃聖依等組成最強啦啦隊，以創新為魂，團隊為翼，共赴腦力盛宴。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 藥商之女許婉寧前世遭丈夫背叛、親生骨肉被害，含恨重生；為了守護孩子並復仇，她與調查禁藥的金鱗衛大督主裴珩結盟，兩人從互有成見的試探，到相知相許的聯手，不僅粉碎了危害朝政的驚天陰謀，更在夢境與現實的交錯中，讓女主重獲自救的勇氣，開啟了全新人生。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 蒼梧國大將軍之女羲和遭滅門及暗算，重生為廢柴嫡女沈千夜。她懷著滿腔不甘踏上復仇之路，與疑似凶手的「小皇叔」裴夙糾纏不休。在調查真相的過程中，兩人從相互算計到聯手抗敵，揭開了蒼梧國隱藏的重重秘密。

programme.title: E1 - 互放狠話火藥味十足
programme.desc: 大型腦力競技真人秀，以「以省之名，我們一起贏」為slogan，由蔣昌建擔任主持人，攸佳寧、龐博、魏坤琳組成中國戰隊領隊候選人，並由朱丹及黃聖依等組成最強啦啦隊，以創新為魂，團隊為翼，共赴腦力盛宴。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E23 - Hastinapur Ke Veer
programme.desc: The untold early years of the Mahabharat's two iconic families - the five righteous Pandava brothers and the ambitious hundred Kaurava brothers growing up in the kingdom of ancient Hastinapur.

programme.title: E72 - Hui Gumm Yaadein
programme.desc: Dr. Dev Mehta, a top surgeon who can't remember his own skills & past 8 years of life. now, forced to restart as an intern and have to re-learn medicine and face the family he no longer knows

programme.title: E12 - Housework
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: E13 - Pass The Parcel
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.desc: When Mr Hammond asks Andy to take pictures of a Bobcat, a wild cat that lives in North America, Andy jets off in his safari mobile and track one down.

programme.desc: The Squirrels think about life's big questions, and gain their Philosophy badges.

programme.desc: The Squirrels are transported into the future where they encounter a robot Duggee!

programme.desc: The changeable weather means Rainbow has to leave before finishing his story. Sarah & Duck try to find out how the story ends.

programme.desc: Myrtle's aunt Cressy is coming to stay, and she needs Stanley to make her a bed for her. This escalates into Stanley building her a whole set of rooms outside Myrtles actual house.

programme.desc: The talking animals talk about all the things they love about the ocean.

programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.desc: It's a grey and rainy day in the real world and Messy can see something amazing outside his window. A beautiful arch of colours magically appears across the sky. He goes to OKIDO to find out more.

programme.title: E1 - Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: E2 - The Face Painting Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone who looks like Enid, only much too big. Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid!

programme.title: E45 - Road Trip
programme.desc: Mum helps Bluey and Bingo find ways to entertain themselves on a family road trip, while Dad tries to stay ahead of the grey nomad convoy or risk camping near the toilets.

programme.title: E13 - Pass The Parcel
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: E14 - Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: E36 - Andy And The Black Crested Macaques
programme.desc: When Andy mistakenly eats a bowl of exotic fruit salad that Mr Hammond left for the black crested macaques, Andy jets off to Sulawesi in search of more.

programme.title: E28 - Ronda Reunion, Spain
programme.desc: Foz tries to play a Spanish guitar, and Xuli is delighted when her first ever souvenir selfie flutters out of it. It shows her on holiday as a child in a Spanish town with her long-lost friend Maria.

programme.title: E18 - Deep Trouble
programme.desc: Max and Monty's antics on a construction site get them into trouble.

programme.title: E28 - Pillow Fill
programme.desc: Scarf Lady helps Sarah & Duck catch the fluffs and puffs to refill their pancaked pillows.

programme.title: E3 - Bubbles
programme.desc: Stanley cleans Cynthia's bus, but each time he does it keeps getting dirty again. It's so dirty by the end, he invents a super-duper cleaning machine that makes a sea of bubbles.

programme.desc: It's a grey and rainy day in the real world and Messy can see something amazing outside his window. A beautiful arch of colours magically appears across the sky. He goes to OKIDO to find out more.

programme.title: E1 - Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: E2 - The Face Painting Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone who looks like Enid, only much too big. Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid!

programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: E1 - A. A Night at the Katz Motel/House of Discontent/Night of the Scarecrow/Mondo Magic/K
programme.desc: Courage, Muriel and Eustace check into a motel run by a sinister cat named Katz. A very long night is in store for the three, especially after Katz turns loose his spiders.

programme.title: E42 - A. Yearbook Madness/Hose Water/Let's Get Serious/Tamaranian Vacation/Rocks and Water
programme.desc: Beast Boy and Cyborg decide to make a yearbook for the Titans.

programme.title: E50 - K-O!: Part 1
programme.desc: Amato is successfully integrating captured robots into society, but a dark twist arises when KubiKO, a sinister new villain, is accidentally unleashed from the crashed Space Prison, sending guard robots to recapture the reformed robots.

programme.title: E116 - Fool Me Twice/World's Best Boss
programme.desc: Mordecai Rigby and Benson end up participating on a Japanese game show on which no competitor has survived

programme.title: E1320 - Pig In A Poke/P.P./A Little Help Please/Marv Wolfman & George Perez/Space House Part
programme.desc: The Titans are worried when Starfire says she has sent all of her money to a prince online, especially when it could be the clown prince himself.

programme.title: E69 - Planet Bears/Poppy Rangers/Bunnies/Panda Two/Kyle
programme.desc: A nature documentary follows the Bears through their normal routine, which includes a trip to the grocery store.

programme.title: News[Live]
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.desc: Teams depart for Osaka, Japan, where they encounter an Intersection at the Roadblock, forcing one partner to team up with a member of another team and complete a challenge performing the taiko drums.

programme.desc: As Hana and Brody search for the killer in the embassy, a bomb is discovered onboard Delaney's jet.

programme.title: What If Pollution Isn't What You Think It Is?
programme.desc: In Uganda, new technology is exposing the toll of urban noise on people and wildlife. Plus: In Mozambique, discarded bottles are helping build a greener future.

programme.title: Operation Barbarossa - War Of Annihilation - Part 2 - Winter
programme.desc: In early September 1941, the German Wehrmacht was advancing on all fronts in the Soviet Union. Kyiv had fallen, the Smolensk stronghold had been defeated and Leningrad was under siege. Hitler intended to launch a major offensive against Moscow before the winter.

programme.title: Minefield Europe - The Return Of A Banned Weapon
programme.desc: Landmines can maim and kill civilians and are banned in many countries under the 1997 Ottawa Treaty. Yet on Europe's northeastern border, these controversial weapons are making a comeback.

programme.title: E86 - Chalons-En-Champagne (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Chalons-en-Champagne, meeting local residents at the market. Today, she enjoys a boat tour of the city and visits the Duduchotheque, dedicated to the world of Cabu.

programme.title: E11 - Around The World In Belgium
programme.desc: Travel around the world... without leaving Belgium! This is the crazy adventure that Nathalie Guirma takes us on. She will stop in Tibet, face her apprehension of the equatorial jungle before taking a break in Papua.

programme.title: E12 - Brussels Art Deco
programme.desc: A journey into this all-encompassing artistic movement, which left its mark of splendor across the world, from New York to Brussels! Tour of the largest Art Deco church in the world, in Koekelberg, and the small L'Esperance hotel, near Rue Neuve, in Brussels.

programme.title: E15 - Around Waffles
programme.desc: For brunch, Isabelle makes waffle batter, recommending preparation the day before for a fluffy result. Sweet or savory variations, including a ham and poached egg topping with bearnaise sauce.

programme.title: E26 - Spa, Between History And Modernity
programme.desc: Discover Villa le Vert-Bois, restored by the colorful decorator Luca de la Pagerie, at just 30 years old, chocolatier Tarquin Fontaine, based in Nalinnes, is starting to make a name for himself, Margaux Baert transforms simple sheets of paper into true works of art.

programme.title: E11 - Around The World In Belgium
programme.desc: Travel around the world... without leaving Belgium! This is the crazy adventure that Nathalie Guirma takes us on. She will stop in Tibet, face her apprehension of the equatorial jungle before taking a break in Papua.

programme.title: E12 - Brussels Art Deco
programme.desc: A journey into this all-encompassing artistic movement, which left its mark of splendor across the world, from New York to Brussels! Tour of the largest Art Deco church in the world, in Koekelberg, and the small L'Esperance hotel, near Rue Neuve, in Brussels.

programme.title: E3 - Jean-Noel Gerz (Paris)/Jeremie Falissard (Montreal)
programme.desc: At Porte de la Chapelle in Paris, Richard Orlinski discovers a former car park that had been transformed into an unusual farm. Jean-Noel Gerz has transformed this area into a mushroom farm, where he grows shiitake mushrooms and oyster mushrooms for short supply chains. In Montreal, chef Jeremie Falissard is now at the head of a culinary empire. On the menu at his restaurant Barocco: mushrooms in all shapes and sizes, served in five courses.

programme.title: E13 - Azou Riding The Waves
programme.desc: In 2022, filmmaker Lisa Diaz chose young Azou to star in her feature film ''Libre Garance!''. Today, Azou is 15 and starting a new chapter in life as she enters tenth grade at the certified surf training center in Pont-l'Abbe.

Sigabo[Live]
programme.desc: The series explores the stark contrast in the lives of two individuals: Gabo (Martin), a spunky, street-smart man from a vibrant, humble community, and Samantha (Montes), a tough, fearless law enforcer from a highly affluent and privileged background. It blends action, romance, and comedy as their paths cross and their different worlds collide.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Kapamilya Daily Mass[Live]

programme.desc: The series explores the stark contrast in the lives of two individuals: Gabo (Martin), a spunky, street-smart man from a vibrant, humble community, and Samantha (Montes), a tough, fearless law enforcer from a highly affluent and privileged background. It blends action, romance, and comedy as their paths cross and their different worlds collide.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Men of Plastic
programme.desc: The most glamorous part of Seoul, Apgujeong thrives with new possibilities. Dae-guk who is a native of Apgujeong and rules its ground, is eager to start his own groundbreaking plastic surgery business. Then he encounters Ji-woo, the most talented surgeon in the area who lost his medical license due to someone sabotaging his reputation. Dae-guk effortlessly comes up with an idea to make this business happen, and he does everything he can to make Ji-woo his partner. Together, Dae-guk and Ji-woo open a whole new era of Apgujeong.

programme.title: The Rising Star -Ho Kai Wa
programme.desc: Ho Kai Wa was first seen for his exceptional dancing skill, yet dancing was only a stepping stone to pursue his dream of becoming an actor. He often brings joy to the audience, but behind the scene he actually bears immense pressure since was overwhelmed by the 'comedic relief' label. Now that he has established himself in the film industry with two films grossed over HK$100 million at the box office. It seems that he has achieved his dream, yet he feels lost and disoriented... In this episode, Kai Wa will shed his on-screen image and talk about his film journey.

programme.title: Full River Red
programme.desc: 12th century China, during the Song Dynasty, set against a brewing rebellion by the Jin people against the Imperial Court.Two hours before a crucial diplomatic meeting between the Song Prime Minister Qin Hui and a high level Jin delegation, the Jin Ambassador is murdered. An important letter destined for the Emperor is stolen from him. As the search for the letter unfolds, alliances are formed, secrets are revealed, and no one can stop the truth that is destined to leave its mark in history.

programme.title: The Rising Star -Ho Kai Wa

E4
programme.desc: 寧檬一直有一個成為投資總監的職業夢想，可畢業後做的工作卻與夢想相距甚遠。她的上司陸既明是一個業務能力極強的投資總裁，他不認為寧檬也能成為合格的投資人。某一天寧檬終於下定決心離開陸既明，向他也向自己證明她可以做到。寧檬重新求職，經過種種阻礙，機緣下最終進入了鷹石投資，開始了她的晉升之路。過程中陸既明也在關注着寧檬，起初他不認可，但在重要關頭還是會對寧檬進行提點，幫助她度過難關。陸既明長遠的投資理念使寧檬獲益匪淺，寧檬也改變了陸既明的處世態度。兩人互相影響，攜手並進，經歷了無數的波折和風浪之後，寧檬蜕變成為了獨當一面的金牌投資人，陸既明也歷練得更加成熟有擔當。他們認定彼此就是自己最正確的那個人。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: E2 - Pirate Songs & Fun Beach Games!
programme.desc: Ahoy, mateys! Join JJ for pirate songs & fun beach games! The adventure begins when JJ & Wally play pirates on the high seas but can't agree on where to find the hidden treasure! Then, when a wave washes away their sandcastle, a little crab helps them try again to build one that's nearly indestructible. The pirate fun continues as Wally tries to swipe JJ's five little duckies during bath time, leading to a sudsy chase to find the ducknapper!

programme.title: E2 - Drawing, Painting, Music & A Quick Fix!
programme.desc: The Minibods are having a day of drawing, painting, music & a quick fix! Newt is drawing a beautiful flower but keeps rushing & crumpling her drawings, so she must learn to slow down. Then, when the Minibods help her finish a huge painting, Newt wants it all for herself! The creative chaos continues as Lulu struggles to make a music video with a marching Oddbird & Bubbles accidentally makes a mess while trying to fix a book dispenser.

programme.title: E3 - Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning, growing & having fun! First, he gets covered in mud & needs to get clean, but he's frightened by the big, noisy carwash! He has to work up the courage to try it himself. Then, after eating too many sweets, Buster gets a sore tooth & Amber the Ambulance teaches him the importance of keeping his teeth clean. In a race against Terry Tractor, Buster also learns that slow & steady can sometimes win the race!

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E5 - Baby John's Guide to Being Safe!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns all about being safe! First, he learns how important it is to always put on his seatbelt when he goes for a ride. Then, Mom & Dad teach the kids what to do if an accident happens & how to avoid them. The safety lessons continue as Baby John learns how to be safe while playing at the playground, at the beach & even while swimming in the pool. It's always important to be safe!

programme.title: E8 - Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.desc: The Minibods are having a day of drawing, painting, music & a quick fix! Newt is drawing a beautiful flower but keeps rushing & crumpling her drawings, so she must learn to slow down. Then, when the Minibods help her finish a huge painting, Newt wants it all for herself! The creative chaos continues as Lulu struggles to make a music video with a marching Oddbird & Bubbles accidentally makes a mess while trying to fix a book dispenser.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 故事講述女主角韓苡茱撞見自己的老公鄭世赫與繼妹韓宥拉出軌後車禍身亡，再次醒來後竟回到四個月前準備試婚紗的時候。得知老公劈腿真相的她決定復仇，於是找上本來要與繼妹相親的徐道國展開聯姻，準備一場手撕綠茶繼妹的報仇計畫。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 一部以專門經營鬼客人的的士為題材的電視劇。以實現鬼神們最後願望的的士司機為中心，敘述多種多樣的故事。

programme.title: E12 - The Titan Games Championship
programme.desc: Regional competition has come to an end and the final Titans from the Central, West and Eastern divisions have advanced to the Championship. Those six elite Titans return for the final rounds of competition. The top two men and women will advance to compete on Mount Olympus one last time. In the end, one man and one woman will be crowned Titan Champions.

programme.desc: When Assistant Coach Ferret goes down with an injury, his replacement, Mr. Cheetah, starts to take over Coach Gills's class.

programme.title: A Taste of Killing and Romance
programme.desc: Judge was one of the top killers of ICE's syndicate. Mr. Tung Fai, a super cop attempted to sue the Triad head, Godfather “Tiger”. Unfortunately, his witness gave false testimony. Worst still, the witness was shot by Judge who impersonated as the presiding Judge in the law court. Meanwhile, Judge met Ru-fung, sister of Ice and both fell in love. The two killers understood they could not have true love. They decided to enjoy love for 3 days, and then separate and return to their killing carrier again.

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: The story is set in the Ming dynasty. 'Holy Sword' requests a fight with secret agent 009's friend 'God of Sword' to decide the world's best swordsman. During the contest on the roof of the Forbidden City, 009 realises that 'Holy Sword' has sent a double to fight in his place, while he plans to assassinate the emperor. 'Holy Sword' finds himself surrounded by thousands of palace guards but is rescued by 'God of Sword', who wants to complete their championship...

programme.title: Funny Ghost
programme.desc: Taxi dancer Yue puts herself head over heels in debt because of gambling. She tries to borrow a loan from her close friend, Ngor, with tricks of suicide. She pretendedly pushes Ngor down a tall building but falls from the rooftop herself. She has got a narrow escape and a windfall of picking up a sack of money from a Chinese spiritualized vase which belongs to a big brother, Hung. With the help of the spirit, Yue and Ngor win so much that they almost lose their sense. They want to keep the vase themselves so they must get away from the pursuit of a killer sent by Hung, as well as another two mysterious detectives...

programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: So, the legendary beggar, is actually born in a princely rich family. Like his father, So leads a lavish life. He once meets Ju Suan and falls in love with the virgin prostitute..

programme.title: E9 - Heaven And Hell
programme.desc: It's one of life's most confounding mysteries: What happens to us after we die? From heaven and hell to resurrection and reincarnation, we'll explore the remarkable possibilities of life after death.

programme.title: E614 - Where The Pawn Stars Roam
programme.desc: When Rick reels in an antique glass fishing buoy made in Japan, he hopes the seller's price floats his boat. Meanwhile, Chum checks out a rare dinosaur fossil. Can he dig up a good price?

programme.title: E11 - Hottest Wheels
programme.desc: From pedal cars to Power Wheels, we're rolling our way through the history of the hottest toys on wheels and the surprising stories behind their creations.

programme.desc: En route through Isabela province, Jaime is persuaded to trade her bike for a racing buffalo. Unfortunately, the buffalo isn't keen to be ridden and makes its displeasure known.

programme.title: E202 - Ain't That a Glitch Part Two
programme.desc: After Marky discovers Lay Lay's secret, he takes advantage by having her use her powers to do what he says. But when an overworked Lay Lay starts glitching, Marky and Sadie must fix her before the girls have to perform at an awards show.

programme.title: E712 - Party Fowl
programme.desc: When Sergio stays at the Louds, he soon gets into trouble when he doesn't want to hang out with the rest of the pets.

programme.title: E104 - The Yard Sale
programme.desc: GrandPat prevents his precious memories from being sold at a family yard sale.

programme.title: E262 - A Cabin in the Kelp / The Hankering
programme.desc: The Gal Pals take Pearl to a cabin in the woods for a weekend of silly pranks. // Mr. Krabs has a secret taste for something surprising.

programme.title: E216 - iMake Sam Girlier
programme.desc: When Sam admits she has a crush on a boy at school, Carly teaches Sam how to entice him by acting more girly. Meanwhile, Spencer is convinced that a girl likes him because of his tuxedo, so he starts wearing it all the time.

programme.title: E121 - #YayDay
programme.desc: Cat invents a holiday, 'Yay Day', which is just an excuse to buy presents for everyone. When Cat snoops what other people have gotten her, she discovers an insulting present from Sam.

programme.title: E207 - Rise of the Night Ninja
programme.desc: When Leo accidentally saves a subway station full of innocent people, he's inspired to take on a life of crime-fighting vigilantism as the Night Ninja! But has he met his match with the villainous La Fleur and her gang of dognappers?

programme.title: E208 - The Night Ninja Returns
programme.desc: The villainous, dog-hating madman known as SCRATCH holds the city's dogs hostage! His only demand? For the Night Ninja to surrender! But Leo, April and the Turtles realize there's more to Scratch than meets the eye.

programme.title: E262 - A Cabin in the Kelp / The Hankering
programme.desc: The Gal Pals take Pearl to a cabin in the woods for a weekend of silly pranks. // Mr. Krabs has a secret taste for something surprising.

programme.title: E211 - Face/Off-Model / 5 Star Restaurant
programme.desc: Squidina helps Patrick get back on-model. // The Star family takes over the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: E224 - Wedding of the Trentury
programme.desc: Captain Man & Danger Force offer to host the ultimate wedding for Swellview's beloved newscaster Trent Overunder and his online girlfriend Tracy426. When they suspect Tracy426 isn't who she claims to be, their meddling threatens to ruin the big day.

programme.title: E705 - Road Trip: Bizarritorium
programme.desc: When Mom is assigned a travel article at work, she takes the entire family on a cross country road trip. But the trip gets off to a bumpy start when Lincoln tries to change Mom's itinerary to go to Dr. Weirdly's Bizarritorium.

programme.title: E706 - Road Trip: Bringing Down the House / Road Trip: Mountain Hard Pass
programme.desc: During a visit of the White House, the Loud kids can't help but sneak off and explore the rooms not on the tour. // Intimidated by an intense day of hiking in the Rocky Mountains, the Loud kids try to find reasons to call off the hike.

programme.title: E707 - Road Trip: From Brad to Worse / Road Trip: Doll Day Afternoon
programme.desc: When the Louds run into Mom's old camp crush turned celebrity at a State Fair, Dad tries to one-up him to impress Rita. // Realizing Mr. Coconuts is missing, Luan rallies the Louds to track him down along Route 66.

programme.title: E112 - Follow the Sprinkles / Canyon Valley V. Dirk
programme.desc: When Lily starts digging to find out why her favorite ice cream truck is selling shaved ice, she uncovers a town-wide conspiracy. // Dirk is wrongfully accused of stealing a Canyon Valley landmark so Min comes out of lawyer retirement to help him.

programme.title: E281 - Karen for Spot
programme.desc: Karen looks after Spot while Plankton goes out of town.

programme.title: E302 - Insta-Gran
programme.desc: Pop Pop introduces his new girlfriend to the family. She seems great until she starts showing up unannounced.

programme.title: E526 - Captain Mom
programme.desc: Captain Man is being a baby about having a baby. Labor pains leave him helpless so Kid Danger and Piper step up to take on a couple of slick grease thieves.

programme.title: E618 - Space Jammed / Crown and Dirty
programme.desc: Annoyed by Leni's intrusive babysitting, Lisa accidentally blasts herself and Todd into space. // Lola tries to whip Mom into tip-top pageant condition for a Mother-Daughter pageant.

programme.title: E303 - Roadie to Nowhere / A Fridge Too Far
programme.desc: After learning that Chunk was like her in high school, Luna worries her ambition to be a rocker is unrealistic. // When food Lincoln has saved in the fridge gets taken, a territory war in the fridge ensues.

programme.desc: Shivprasad and Shalini, an ordinary married couple, embrace love, laughter, and everyday joys, weaving a simple yet fulfilling life that celebrates togetherness and quiet contentment.

programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.title: BMW Charity Pro-Am presented by TD SYNNEX
PGA TOUR Champions 2026 Principal Charity Classic -Day 3
PGA TOUR Champions 2026 Principal Charity Classic -Day 3
E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E1 - Save this Shark
programme.desc: 3x World Surf Champion turned wildlife conservationist Mick Fanning teams up with leading experts in new documentary SAVE THIS SHARK. Mick Fanning is on a new mission to explore shark conservation. The 3x world surfing champion will hop around the world teaming up with experts and conservationists to uncover the hidden truths about sharks, threats and how to save them from extinction. Mick will investigate the issue of sharks versus people and present problems as well as discover the latest technological solutions in how to keep both humans and sharks safe to coexist. Our host has had some incredible achievements throughout his professional career, but one moment stood out to the world live on television in 2015. A shark encounter at the J-Bay Open saw Mick Fanning become ‘the guy who punched a shark’. A huge part of saving sharks is convincing people that they need our help and putting aside the fear factor. In Save This Shark, Mick takes this incredible opportunity to go on his ow

programme.title: E5 - Gary and Lou With Alice
programme.desc: British eccentrics Lou and Gary recently moved to the Yukon and are seeking space for livestock in the gold rush town of Dawson City.

Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E3 - You Call That an Explosion?
programme.desc: Chris and Wayner forgo family time between performances to join local racer and wild man, Billy for an afternoon of shooting guns and blowing stuff up, while Brooke's mounting frustration doesn’t fare well for their return.

E2 - Realm of Jungles
programme.desc: Plunge into crystal-clear seas to explore the Tubbataha Reef, which rests on an extinct underwater volcano where shallow lagoons shelter sea turtles and tiger sharks. Take flight with tarsiers as they hunt insects using powerful leaps between trees.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of Jungles
programme.desc: Plunge into crystal-clear seas to explore the Tubbataha Reef, which rests on an extinct underwater volcano where shallow lagoons shelter sea turtles and tiger sharks. Take flight with tarsiers as they hunt insects using powerful leaps between trees.

programme.title: E3 - Eat Or Be Eaten
programme.desc: Go up against predatory insects that are tailor-made for killing. See why the terrifying praying mantis has the agility of a martial artist and an appetite for everything from flies to hummingbirds, then go hunting in mid-air with deadly dragonflies.

programme.title: E3 - The Last Desert Giants
programme.desc: The Namib is the oldest desert in the world, hugging Africa’s shoreline for over 400 kilometers. It is one of the most inhospitable habitats on earth. Yet the world’s largest land mammal has made a home here, adapted through behavior and designed to life in the extreme.

programme.title: E6 - Extreme
programme.desc: Learn how plants and animals tough it out in some of the driest terrain Earth has to offer. Run across thirsty trees that act as elephant signposts, see insects team up with plants for a chance at life, and get insight into natural chemical warfare.

programme.title: E1 - Super Sight
programme.desc: Vision – it’s how ninety-five percent of animals interpret the world. Every species on Earth is a chapter in the fascinating story of sight. This episode follows that story from blurry beginnigs to mind-blowing hexnocular vision.

programme.title: E4 - Beetle Mania
programme.desc: Get a sanitation lesson from nature’s original cleanup crew. Learn how beetles keep ecosystems in balance with clever biological weapons like tusks and toxic sprays, then see why the 6,000-plus species of dung beetles are the world’s unsung heroes.

programme.desc: Plunge into crystal-clear seas to explore the Tubbataha Reef, which rests on an extinct underwater volcano where shallow lagoons shelter sea turtles and tiger sharks. Take flight with tarsiers as they hunt insects using powerful leaps between trees.

programme.title: E3 - Eat Or Be Eaten
programme.desc: Go up against predatory insects that are tailor-made for killing. See why the terrifying praying mantis has the agility of a martial artist and an appetite for everything from flies to hummingbirds, then go hunting in mid-air with deadly dragonflies.

programme.title: E3 - The Last Desert Giants
programme.desc: The Namib is the oldest desert in the world, hugging Africa’s shoreline for over 400 kilometers. It is one of the most inhospitable habitats on earth. Yet the world’s largest land mammal has made a home here, adapted through behavior and designed to life in the extreme.

programme.title: E6 - Extreme
programme.desc: Learn how plants and animals tough it out in some of the driest terrain Earth has to offer. Run across thirsty trees that act as elephant signposts, see insects team up with plants for a chance at life, and get insight into natural chemical warfare.

programme.title: E1 - Super Sight
programme.desc: Vision – it’s how ninety-five percent of animals interpret the world. Every species on Earth is a chapter in the fascinating story of sight. This episode follows that story from blurry beginnigs to mind-blowing hexnocular vision.

programme.title: E4 - Beetle Mania
programme.desc: Get a sanitation lesson from nature’s original cleanup crew. Learn how beetles keep ecosystems in balance with clever biological weapons like tusks and toxic sprays, then see why the 6,000-plus species of dung beetles are the world’s unsung heroes.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's ‘The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S8
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: E14 - Simone Pheulpin/Julian Klausner/Sophie Brillouet
programme.desc: The Albert-Kahn museum unveils the banker's humanist project. Sometimes called ''the time folder'', Simone Pheulpin works with cotton ribbon. For his first show at Dries Van Noten, Julian Klausner plays with textures and colours. Sophie Brillouet's studio is alive with beach air.

programme.title: Les Joueuses #Paslapourdanser
programme.desc: The Olympique Lyonnais players are among the best having gone from victory to victory and won the French championship thirteen times. A glimpse into their daily lives, asking us to change the way we look at the place of women in sport, where the values of respect and openness are essential to move towards equality.

programme.title: E8 - Eric Francois, Kevin Bonnabel
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.
